hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.rs || "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.py || "$FILE" == *.go || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.c || "$FILE" == *.cpp || "$FILE" == *.java ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *README* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *DESIGN_DOC* ]] && [[ "$FILE" != *.specs/* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); if [ ! -f "$DIR/README.md" ]; then echo "[specdriven] Source file modified in $DIR but no README.md spec exists. Consider running /specdriven:spec-from-code or /specdriven:module-design for this module."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *GOAL\&REQUIREMENTS.md || "$FILE" == *DESIGN_DOC.md || "$FILE" == *.specs/* || "$FILE" == *current_tasks/* ]]; then PROGRESS=".specs/.progress.yaml"; mkdir -p .specs; TIMESTAMP=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); if [ ! -f "$PROGRESS" ]; then echo "updated: $TIMESTAMP" > "$PROGRESS"; else sed -i "s/^updated:.*/updated: $TIMESTAMP/" "$PROGRESS" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f .specs/registry.json ]; then TOTAL=$(python3 -c "import json; r=json.load(open(\'.specs/registry.json\')); print(len(r.get(\'specs\', [])))" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); GNR=""; if [ -f "GOAL&REQUIREMENTS.md" ]; then GNR=" Goal & requirements: defined."; fi; echo "[specdriven] Spec-driven project: $TOTAL specs tracked.$GNR Run /specdriven:cli-progress for workflow status."; else echo "[specdriven] No spec registry found. Run /specdriven:spec-init to set up specification-driven development."; fi'
